response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Audio phonetically matches the provided Reference JSON lyrics. 2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the reference lyrics for transcription and translation; manually translated the on-screen disclaimer and title card at the end of the video. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal bursts to prevent cascading delays. Discrete blocks were used for visual text in the absence of audio, such as the end-stream disclaimer and title card.
